description: User redirection actions that can modify roadmap, phases, or execution at any point

actions.description: Regenerate the roadmap with new direction or feedback
actions.resultAction: Creates new RoadmapVersion, supersedes previous roadmap artifact

actions.description: Re-run the current phase with new direction
actions.resultAction: Clears current phase completion, re-executes phase steps

actions.description: Change the execution order of roadmap phases
actions.resultAction: Reorders roadmap entries, creates new RoadmapVersion

actions.description: Remove phases or deliverables from the roadmap
actions.resultAction: Re-generates roadmap with reduced scope, creates new RoadmapVersion

actions.description: Add phases or deliverables to the roadmap
actions.resultAction: Re-generates roadmap with expanded scope, creates new RoadmapVersion

actions.description: Restart from discovery with context preservation
actions.resultAction: Resets to discovery phase, creates pivot-context artifact
Marks not-started/planning sub-phases as failed with cancel decision
